TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_sasinglan, title = sasinglan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/sasinglan} }

S.FORM: == sasinglan == u zuma a kumu: u Hulam :窗戶 u Amilika :window u Lipun :窓
S.PHON: == sasiŋr~ɾan == u zuma a kumu: u ħur~ɾam :** u amir~ɾika :window u r~ɾipun :*
